title: Things To Do in Boone NC This Weekend | April 2026
excerpt: Spring has arrived in the North Carolina High Country, and Boone is absolutely alive with things to do this weekend — from trail hikes and waterfalls to local markets and live music. If you've ever thought about buying a home in Boone NC, there's no better time to come up, look around, and fall in love with the mountain life.
image_alt: Downtown Boone NC King Street in spring with blooming trees and Blue Ridge mountains in the background
